response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and open-source experience, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ expertise in industrial or embedded contexts beyond a brief role at National Instruments 10 years ago, with no evidence of modern C++/STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or IoT protocols required for this role; current work is dominated by TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no cloud or industrial automation exposure.
strengths: Strong full-stack and open-source contributions with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and technical workshops
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across platforms and domains
concerns: No recent or substantial C++ development experience beyond 2015
Lacks exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or IoT protocols
No evidence of cloud-native, message-broker, or high-performance C++ system design
